titleStmt.title: SII 33.5: original edition by K. Munirathnam and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 5. (A.R. No. 111 of 1946.) Agaḍūru, Pulivendla Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab set up infront of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Kārttika, śu. 12, corresponding to 1544 A.D., October 27, Monday.

Records the gift of local toll income collected from markets (Pēṁṭastaḷasuṁkhamu) for conducting the various festivals such as the floating festivals on daśami day and Uṭla-tirunāla to the god Chennakēśava at Amaḍūru by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Raṅgayadēva-Mahārāja, son of Saṁmaka Tipayadēva of the Ātrēya-gōtra, for the merit of his parents and Yeṟaguḍi Ti[mma]ma Rājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa
ṁbulu 1466 Agunēṁṭi krōdhi saṁvatsara kārtika
śu 12 lu śrīrmamahārājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrī sadāsivarāya mahārāya
lu vijayanagaraṁlōnu vajraśiṁhāsanārū
ḍuḍai pṛdhvīrājyaṁ śeyucuṁḍaṁgānu Ama
ḍūri ceṁnakēśvara dēvuniki Atriyagōtraṁ śrī
man mahāmaṁḍalēśvara saṁmaka tipayadēvama
hārājula komāruḍu raṁgayadēvamahārāju
lu Iccina dēvaśāsanamu Amaḍūri pēṁṭastaḷasuṁkha
mādēvuniki daśami tirunāḷa mahōtsavānaku sa
vuṭla tirunāḷa mahōtsavānakunu tirkāṇi dvāda
śi teppatirunāḷa mahōtsavānakunnudhāravō
śi Istimi yaṟaguḍi ti(mma)marājayyavāriki
mātalli mātaṁḍriki puṇyaṁgānu dhāravōśi
Istimigāna Imahōtsavāla sēsuka peṁṭa(sta)
ḷa suṁkhaṁ rū sēsuka(tiru)vārādhanasēsukabaḍu
Digital edition of SII 33.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
